security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob: https://*.hdslb.com https://*.bilibili.com; connect-src 'self' http://127.0.0.1:*; font-src 'self'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'

bundle.shortDescription: Local Bilibili media downloader and live recorder
bundle.longDescription: Bilidown is a local-only desktop downloader and live recorder for media you are authorized to save.
